steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: You have proven your worth, foner. The Bou de Pedra was merely the first guardian.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: Take this ancient power. The Talayotic mask shall bend stone to your will.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Ramon, look! A mask! The legends about the Dimoni's trials were true...

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: I can feel its power. The stones themselves tremble!
